Author: rail
Name: Aether Blackbox
Description: Replay positions and events before death. /abb to open; Connects to an external websocket relay for opt-in live sync mode (no PII sent) at blackbox.aetherdraw.me
Punchline: A visual replay of positions before death. DeathRecap + AetherDraw
Changelog:
v7.51.2.0: New Feature: auto-replay, log highlights, auto-player selection, resizable left panel. Fixed shape handles and canvas syncing.
v7.51.0.1: ui scaling fix
v7.51.0.0: wip aoe added post wipe
